people.name: Laura Hartmann
people.headline: PhD Student, Computational Neuroscience @ MPI for Brain Research
people.why_relevant: Same undergrad program as the user. Now doing exactly the PhD the user is curious about. Public posts suggest she answers student DMs.

people.name: Noah Becker
people.headline: ML Engineer @ BrainLab AG · ex-TUM Bio-CS
people.why_relevant: Industry path after Bio-CS. Would be the person to ask whether to do a master's or go straight to industry neurotech.

people.name: Dr. Auguste Schulz
people.headline: Postdoc, Computation in Neural Circuits @ TUM
past: PhD in Neural Dynamics, University of Tübingen
people.why_relevant: Directly in the lab the user's current prof runs. The practical day-to-day contact for a rotation — easier to reach than the PI first.

people.name: Jonas Richter

people.why_relevant: Did the GSN-LMU summer fellowship the user should apply to, then pharma DS role. Candid about non-academic neuro paths.
